design_philosophy: Clean, professional, dashboard-style UI suitable for a B2B IT services client. Strict, function-first layout with high data density for technicians and administrators. Zero visual fluff. Color is reserved strictly for status communication (SLA breaches, resolving) and primary actions.

structure.sidebar: w-64 fixed left-0 top-0 h-screen bg-slate-950 flex flex-col border-r border-slate-800
structure.header: h-16 border-b border-slate-200 bg-white flex items-center justify-between px-8 sticky top-0 z-40

buttons.primary: bg-blue-600 text-white rounded-md px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium hover:bg-blue-700 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500 focus:ring-offset-2 transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-slate-700 border border-slate-300 rounded-md px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium hover:bg-slate-50 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-slate-500 focus:ring-offset-2 transition-colors
buttons.destructive: bg-red-600 text-white rounded-md px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium hover:bg-red-700 transition-colors

inputs.base: w-full border border-slate-300 rounded-md px-3 py-2 text-sm text-slate-900 focus:border-blue-500 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-blue-500 outline-none transition-all
inputs.label: block text-sm font-medium text-slate-700 mb-1

tables.wrapper: w-full overflow-hidden rounded-lg border border-slate-200 bg-white
tables.header: bg-slate-50 text-left text-xs font-semibold text-slate-500 uppercase tracking-wider border-b border-slate-200 px-4 py-3

badges.base: inline-flex items-center px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium border

login.layout: Split screen. Left: Branding/Image overlay. Right: Clean white form container center-aligned.

ticket_detail.layout: 2-column bento. Left (col-span-2): Ticket content, discussion thread, internal notes (tabs). Right (col-span-1): Meta data card (Status, Assignee, SLA countdown, Tags).

icons.style: stroke-width: 2, minimal, scale proportionally with text

image_urls.description: Dark, abstract server rack room to be used on the left half of the split-screen login page. Must have a blue/dark overlay to ensure contrast if any text is overlaid.
Subtle blue geometric network background for header accents or generic empty states.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure all text meets WCAG AA 4.5:1 ratio. Pay special attention to SLA warning/breach badges.
accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: CRITICAL: Every interactive element (buttons, links, table rows, form inputs, tab triggers, dropdown items) MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute using kebab-case role-based naming (e.g., 'data-testid="ticket-submit-button"').

instructions_to_main_agent: Use Shadcn UI components for Tables, Dropdowns, Tabs, and Dialogs, but strip away excess soft shadows. Make them look structural and sharp.
Do not use transparent headers. The top utility bar must have a solid white background.
For the SLA Countdown indicators, use the 'status' colors defined in this JSON. Ensure tabular-nums are applied so the countdown doesn't jiggle.
Ensure the sidebar navigation clearly indicates the active state with the brand_accent color and a bold left border.
For charts (Dashboard), use Recharts wrapped in Shadcn Chart components. Keep them minimalist—remove grid lines if possible, or use very faint slate-100 lines.
